batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
The Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem is locked; do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Helian Xuedai logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, or modern mark.

Helian Xuedai must read as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard with a human face, oppressive brow-cheek-jaw structure, real biological bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, sharp murderous eyes, and heavy guard build.
Do not make her a bear-faced beast head, low-ranking tribesperson, Frosthoof deer, Lu Mi costume variant, shaman, generic human with bear-ear decoration, soft doll-faced noblewoman, or cute mascot.
Bear ears must have visible skull attachment, ear roots, inner ear structure, fur flow, and sideburn transition; never fake headband ears, pom-pom ears, hair-bun ears, or costume ears.
Face and eyes must preserve high-ranking female warrior pressure: heavy brow, compressed cheekbones, strong jawline, firm mouth, narrowed predatory eyes, and calm murderous restraint.
Preserve white bear fur mantle, silver-black bone-iron armor, bronze bracers, bone-iron shield, guard axe, jade clasp, red oath cord, large hands, short claws, and ice-stud boots.
No deer ears, deer antlers, deer markings, shaman flute, herb pouch, or ice-blue ritual fire focus.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
